creator: ue@nathan.ruhr.de
text:
I do not think that we should lists the SB PCI and SB Live! without any
kind of warning.  I've used both of them with FreeBSD.  We have enough
support to use them for playback but AFAIK there are some features of
these cards where the support is flaky and/or not present at all:

- recording
- support for the digital outputs
- Dolby Stuff (for the new 5.1 models)
- surrond sound (both 4 speaker and 5+1 speaker setups)

Just my $0.02
